mapper.select: SELECT o.*, p.product_name FROM customer_orders o LEFT JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
SELECT o.*, p.product_name FROM customer_orders o LEFT JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY o.order_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT o.*, p.product_name FROM customer_orders o LEFT JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT o.*, p.product_name FROM customer_orders o LEFT JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_orders (order_no, customer_name, product_id, quantity, unit_price, status, notes) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, 'PENDING', #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE customer_orders SET status = #{status}, work_order_id = #{workOrderId}, purchase_order_id = #{purchaseOrderId}, shipment_id = #{shipmentId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
